name: Durango (Lower)
thresholds:
ERC > 90%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 11
Max Temp > 89, Min Rh < 9, 1000hr Fuels < 9, Max RH < 30
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The Lower Fire Danger Rating Area uses the following Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model Z (Slash) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
Nucla (55807), Chapin (55704), Mockingbird (55710), Mesa Mtn (55805).
